title: UNICA - 211info
text: EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO UNICA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a crisis line for domestic violence and sexual assault. Also provides case management, survivor advocacy, housing help, support groups, parenting support, community education, and help with restraining and stalking orders. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latino domestic violence and sexual assault survivors Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours a day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 232-4448 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (503) 232-4448 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Crisis line: Call for support Case management: Call the crisis line to make an appointment and join the waitlist. Leave a message if there's no answer; calls are usually returned within 72 hours. If not in immediate danger, applicant can choose to be added to the waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Hotlines * Hispanic/Latino Community Domestic Violence Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Domestic Violence Issues Sexual Assault Hotlines * Hispanic/Latino Community Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Prevention * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD JUSTICE HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME FINDER SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH AND FAMILY EDUCATION ENGAGEMENT PREK-12 INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
